title: Centre for Advanced Manufacturing and Supply Chains - Home
text: Centre for Advanced Manufacturing and Supply ChainsCentre for Advanced Manufacturing and Supply ChainsEnabling more resilient, sustainable and inclusive manufacturing ecosystems and supply chains.Transforming manufacturing industries and supply chains to drive innovation and responsible growthThe Centre for Advanced Manufacturing and Supply Chains accelerates responsible industry transformation by bringing together the world’s foremost multistakeholder manufacturing and supply chains community to exchange best practices, develop new insights and scale cross-industry collaborations.231Business partners11Initiatives 238LighthousesOur initiatives on advanced manufacturing and supply chainsOur initiatives are advancing innovation, resilience and sustainability across global production and supply systems.The Global Lighthouse NetworkThis community of manufacturers shows leadership in using Fourth Industrial Revolution technologies to transform factories, value chains and business models, for compelling financial and operational returns.Industry Net Zero AcceleratorSupporting industries to accelerate their decarbonization journey to achieve Net Zero emissions by or before 2050.Frontline Talent of the FutureA global community of private and public leaders committed to advancing societal and economic outcomes by leveraging solutions for attraction, skilling, and retention of manufacturing talent.Discover LuminaLumina is an AI-enabled intelligence platform for industrial transformation. Built on eight years of the Global Lighthouse Network (GLN), it connects audited evidence and peer experience into decision intelligence that is evidence-based, contextual and focused on execution.Our impactWe work with partners to transform manufacturing and supply chains in ways that support responsible growth and long-term competitiveness.Global Lighthouse Network: Transforming advanced manufacturing238 factories are now engaged in the network, implementing advanced manufacturing technologies and boosting productivity, sustainability and resilient supply chains.Reducing the carbon footprint of the manufacturing industry through data sharingWe are fostering collaboration to develop technical solutions and demonstrate how CO2 emissions data can be exchanged along supply networks.Join us in shaping the future of advanced manufacturingWe believe that progress happens by bringing people together. People from all walks of life, who have the drive and the influence to make a positive change. Be part of that change and join our community.World Economic Forum CentresThe world is confronted with a range of unprecedented challenges, and it's crucial for businesses, governments, and civil society to work together to find common solutions and take decisive action. Through its Centres, the Forum integrates public-private efforts to achieve greater impact.Centre for Advanced Manufacturing and Supply ChainsPowered by© 2026 All rights reservedPrivacy Policy & Terms of Service
